Dout

-----Original Message-----
From: "Ryan C. Wisehart, PLS" <rwisehart@visurveyors.com>

Date: Tue, 9 Oct 2007 15:35:31 
To:<dougdstine@aol.com>
Subject: Little St. James


Doug, 
  
I have forwarded a proposal to Mr. Epstein via John Amerling for the work Mr. 
Molyneux requested.  I have been advised not to proceed with any work until 
authorized by the owner.  Therefore, I may not be able to respond to your 
immediate request by Thursday.  Please update Mr. Molyneux as to our status. 
  
Sincerely, 
  
Ryan C. Wisehart, PLS
